name: setup-engineering-workflow
description: Set up the engineering workflow's per-repo context: an `## Agent skills` block in AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md plus `docs/agents/` capturing the issue tracker (GitHub, GitLab, or local markdown), triage label vocabulary, and domain doc layout, with the full workflow skill map recorded as a reference inventory.

interface.shortDescription: Scaffold the engineering workflow's per-repo context
interface.longDescription: Set up the engineering workflow's per-repo context: an `## Agent skills` block in AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md plus `docs/agents/` capturing the issue tracker (GitHub, GitLab, or local markdown), triage label vocabulary, and domain doc layout, with the full workflow skill map recorded as a reference inventory.
defaultPrompt: Use $setup-engineering-workflow to scaffold the engineering workflow's per-repo context.
